title: confiture validate-config --format json
description: Offline config + migrations-tree validation report (issue #144). Never connects to a database. Each issues[] element is the shared issue object.

valid.description: True if there are no error-severity issues.

config_source.description: Where the validated config came from.

migrations_path.description: The migrations directory that was validated.

migration_count.description: Number of migration files discovered in migrations_path.
